# Q 

2 

M 

ECOWASH

## Exterior / maintenance

### Waterless, rinseless wash and drying aid in one product.

Q²M EcoWash is a concentrated product designed for cleaning vehicles without running water. It can be used as a waterless wash, rinseless wash or drying aid, depending on dilution. The formula allows safe cleaning in locations where traditional washing is not possible or permitted.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_eco-wash_1000_500_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Concentrated waterless and rinseless wash.

Q²M EcoWash provides a flexible washing solution while maintaining safety and gloss. Its SiO₂-enriched formula increases slickness and helps reduce the risk of wash-induced defects, making it suitable for maintaining ceramic-coated vehicles.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons70.svg)

SLICK FOR MAXIMUM SAFETY 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons17.svg)

GLOSSY AND STREAK FREE FINISH 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons57.svg)

REDUCE WATER USAGE 

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mecowash.webp)

CAPACITIES 

500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML

DILUTION

Waterless wash 1:15/1:10 - Rinseless 1:256/1:150 - Drying Aid 1:20

PH LEVEL

7-9

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

ECOWASH

01
Dilute Q²M EcoWash according to the chosen application method. 

02
Spray the solution onto the surface or towel. 

03
Gently wipe using a clean microfibre towel. 

04
Flip the towel frequently to avoid dragging dirt. 

05
Buff lightly if used as a drying aid. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Can Q²M EcoWash replace a traditional wash? 

Yes, when water use is not possible.

02
Is it safe for ceramic coated cars? 

Yes. It is suitable for coated and uncoated surfaces.

03
What dilutions can be used? 

Different ratios are used for waterless wash, rinseless wash, and drying aid, as referred to in the tech data.

04
Does it add protection? 

It adds slickness and light water repellency during use.

05
Can it be used in restricted washing areas? 

Yes. It is designed for situations where regular washing is not allowed.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/18544419089052-Q-M-ECOWash)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
